meta.notes: Sub-workflow 1c: receives all built-prompt items from orchestrator, filters to media_type=audio and persona != study-bard, processes ONE item at a time via Split in Batches (batch size 1) to avoid rate-limit issues, generates speech with ElevenLabs eleven_turbo_v2_5, uploads MP3 to Supabase Storage, inserts post. Each persona maps to a distinct ElevenLabs voice with tuned stability/similarity_boost for differentiated delivery. Env vars: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY, SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY
